description: Convenience & Compound Tools — 4 new tools: search_projects, bulk_export_issues, get_export_status, dismiss_issues
constraints: Follow existing 3-layer pattern: MCP Tool → Service → API
Use Zod schemas as plain objects (not z.object()), matching existing tools
All tools must be registered in src/mcp/tools/index.ts
Vendor media types required for all API calls (Accept + Content-Type headers)
deno task check && deno task lint && deno fmt --check must all pass
Compound tools should complement, not replace, existing atomic tools
dismiss_issues requires at least one filter criterion — refuse to dismiss without a filter
nonGoals: Adding write operations beyond what the API supports

glossary.compound tool: A tool that combines multiple API calls into a single operation for common workflows
glossary.auto-resolution: Handler logic that resolves project_mapping_id and bts_issue_type_id from config_id + project_id
glossary.RSQL: REST query language used by Polaris for filter parameters

userStories.title: Create shared export resolution helper (inline)
userStories.description: Create src/mcp/export-helpers.ts with resolveExportParams() for auto-resolving project_mapping_id and bts_issue_type_id. If the file already exists from another branch, skip this story by marking it complete.
acceptanceCriteria: src/mcp/export-helpers.ts exports resolveExportParams(configId, projectId, btsIssueTypeId?)
Returns {projectMappingId, issueTypeId} on success or {error: string} on failure
Fetches project mappings and finds the one matching projectId
Clear error messages guide user to correct tools when resolution fails
Typecheck passes: deno task check

hints: This is the same helper described in PRD-05. Building it here for independence.
If the file already exists (from a concurrent branch merge), just verify it works and skip
Import from services layer, not API layer

userStories.title: Implement search_projects tool
userStories.description: Create src/mcp/tools/search-projects.ts — search for projects by name across all applications in a portfolio using the portfolio-level project filter.
acceptanceCriteria: src/mcp/tools/search-projects.ts exports searchProjectsTool
Schema: portfolio_id (required string), name (required string)
Handler queries portfolio-level projects with name filter (RSQL: name=='value')
Returns summarized {total, items: [{id, name, applicationId, defaultBranch: {id, name}}]}
Tool registered in src/mcp/tools/index.ts
Typecheck passes: deno task check

hints: Look at get_portfolio_projects or get_projects to understand how to query projects at portfolio level
applicationId may be extractable from _links on the project object or from a parent field
Return a clean summarized response, not the full API objects
Use the existing service functions, not raw API calls

userStories.title: Implement get_export_status tool
userStories.description: Create src/mcp/tools/get-export-status.ts — parallel fetch issues + linked_issues, partition into exported/not-exported.
acceptanceCriteria: src/mcp/tools/get-export-status.ts exports getExportStatusTool
Schema: config_id (required), project_id (required), branch_id (optional), severity (optional)
Handler fetches issues and linked_issues in parallel using Promise.all
Partitions issues into exported (with issueKey, issueLink) and not-exported
Returns {project_id, totalIssues, exported: {count, items}, notExported: {count, items}}
Tool registered in src/mcp/tools/index.ts
Typecheck passes: deno task check

hints: Use Promise.all to fetch issues and linked issues concurrently
Build a Map from issueId → linked issue for O(1) lookup
Keep response items small — {issueId, name, severity} for each, plus {issueKey, issueLink} for exported ones
Look at get_issues handler to understand how to call the findings service

userStories.title: Implement bulk_export_issues tool
userStories.description: Create src/mcp/tools/bulk-export-issues.ts — max 50 issues, auto-resolves params, skips already-exported, returns summary.
acceptanceCriteria: src/mcp/tools/bulk-export-issues.ts exports bulkExportIssuesTool
Schema: config_id (required), project_id (required), issue_ids (required array), bts_issue_type_id (optional), branch_id (optional)
Handler validates max 50 issue_ids
Handler auto-resolves project_mapping_id and bts_issue_type_id via resolveExportParams
Handler checks linked_issues to skip already-exported issues
Handler exports each non-exported issue sequentially, collecting results
Returns {summary: {total, exported, skipped, failed}, exported: [...], skipped: [...], failed: [...]}
Tool registered in src/mcp/tools/index.ts
Typecheck passes: deno task check

hints: Fetch linked issues once upfront to build alreadyExported Set
Export sequentially (not parallel) to avoid rate limiting
Catch errors per-issue — don't let one failure stop the batch
Look at export-issues.ts for the exact service call pattern

userStories.title: Implement dismiss_issues tool
userStories.description: Create src/mcp/tools/dismiss-issues.ts — builds RSQL from filenames, severity, issue_ids convenience params, calls triage_issues internally.
acceptanceCriteria: src/mcp/tools/dismiss-issues.ts exports dismissIssuesTool

Schema: application_id (optional), project_id (optional), branch_id (optional), test_id (optional), filenames (optional array), severity (optional string), issue_ids (optional array), reason (required enum), comment (optional)
Handler validates exactly one of application_id or project_id is provided
Handler validates at least one filter criterion (filenames, severity, or issue_ids) is provided
Handler builds RSQL filter: filenames → occurrence:filename=in=(...), severity → occurrence:severity=in=(...), issue_ids → occurrence:occurrence-id=in=(...), joined with ; (AND)
Handler calls triage service with dismissal-reason + optional comment (known-good combination)
Returns {dismissed: count, reason, filter, comment}
Tool registered in src/mcp/tools/index.ts
Typecheck passes: deno task check

hints: Look at triage-issues.ts to understand how to call the triage service
Use occurrence:filename (NOT occurrence:filePath) for triage filters — confirmed working
Use occurrence:occurrence-id (NOT occurrence:id) — confirmed working
The triage properties for dismissal should ONLY include dismissal-reason and optionally comment — never include status
Escape single quotes in filenames to prevent RSQL injection
